reviews.review_description:
My name is CarrotVR, the original project felix helped my channel grow, project felix brought me to where i am today. 
Thank you, Felix for making Project Felix, and Project Felix: Reawakened. - CarrotVR (P.S: if you dont know what i mean, I started gtag content on YouTube by playing Project Felix.)
My first time playing and met 4 moderators that blamed me for doing bankable things (which I wasn't) and they banned me. It doesn't tell me for how long either.

i miss this game and i hope it gets big again big ish and yeah i think there's one downside to it and i wish lucy would spawn a little bit less frequently otherwise amazing game i like the semi custom forest and i hope it gets big once again

reviews.review_title: Don't play this game is bad
reviews.review_description: Is lagging and basically no comments and you can't use mods in tag
